title: Advance Ruling – Instructions for Completion of the Classification Application Form.
text:
Instructions for Completion of the Classification Application Form
The following instructions provide specific guidance on the completion of the Application
for Advance Ruling (Classification). Please read them carefully before completing your
application. If there is not enough room on the form to provide a full response, please
attach an additional page or additional pages.
Box 1.a. Applicant
For these purposes, an applicant means a person who has applied to the GRA-
Customs authorities for an advance ruling. Full name and address of the applicant
should be provided.
Box 1.b. Other interested parties
For these purposes, an other interested party means a person, or authorized agent of a
person, who has a demonstrable interest in the questions presented in the request. The
name, address, telephone, and e-mail address of the interested party should be
provided.
Box 2. Detailed Description of Goods
A description of the goods in question should be sufficiently detailed to enable the
goods to be identified and classified in the (Ghana Tariff Statistical Number) (TSN). A
complete description of the goods would include: the packing weight, the chemical
analysis; the description of the goods; the production and expiration date; the name and
brand of the goods; the physical description; function of the goods; composition of the
goods; characteristics of components; the commercial or technical designation of the
goods; and where the goods consist of more than one material, the composition of the
goods by weight, volume, and value of each component.
Box 3. Port of: Arrival, loading, transit (where applicable)
List the port of arrival and the port of loading. List the port of transit, where applicable.
Box 4. Enclosures being submitted to assist with advance ruling of the goods
Any samples, photographs, plans, catalogues or other documents available, which may
assist in determining the correct classification of the goods in the TSN, should be
attached as annexes, if necessary.
Box 5. Confidential information
Any information which the applicant wishes to be treated as confidential, including the
trademark and model number of the goods, should be indicated.
Box 6. Classification envisaged by applicant (Ghana Tariff Statistical Number) (TSN)

The applicant is invited to express a view as to the TSN for the goods envisaged.
Box 7. General Interpretative Rule(s) considered being applicable for the
classification envisaged
The applicant is invited to express a view as to which General Interpretative Rule, or
Rules, would constitute the legal basis for the classification proposed (Box 6). The
applicant can moreover provide any additional information in support of the
classification envisaged in Box 6.
Box 8. Have you previously applied for an advance ruling for identical or similar
goods?
An indication as to whether the applicant has previously applied for an advance ruling
for identical or similar goods should be given here. Details with regard to that application
should also be included.
Box 9. Are you aware of the existence of an advance ruling for identical or similar
goods?
Any knowledge on the part of the applicant of the existence of an earlier advance ruling
in respect of goods of the same kind should be indicated, quoting references.
Box 10. Are you aware whether the goods are the subject of a classification
verification process or any instance of review or appeal before any governmental
agency, appellate tribunal or court?
Any knowledge on the part of the applicant of the existence of a classification
verification process or any instance of review or appeal before any governmental
agency, appellate tribunal or court with respect to the goods should be indicated,
quoting references.
Box 11. Do you consent to have your ruling published?
All rulings will be published for which an applicant has given consent.
